Notes
  • Keeley Construction (Jacob Hill) — ramp completed Apr 25, verified via site visit Apr 28. Returning Mon, May 4 for finishing touches on edges, reinstalling fencing, and roll & seal concrete-to-asphalt joints. Pricing pending for asphalt around building slabs post-demo; if approved, will be done on same trip.
  • SENDME PRO (Robert Jaimeson) — both buildings on the ground, being cut down and hauled off. Fence posts being set Apr 29. Targeting completion Wed, May 6 due to inclement weather Friday expected to cost a day of work.
  • Site visit completed Apr 28 — ramp looks great; met with Robert to confirm SENDME PRO progress on track.
  • AAR Inc. — completed Apr 9. All ACM removed from both buildings before demo.
  • SENDME PRO (Robert Jaimeson) — confirmed. Scope: fencing demo, building demo, retaining wall demo, yard debris removal & disposal. Mobilized Apr 27, completion est. Wed May 6.
  • SENDME PRO — fencing portion est. 5–6 days; full project scope (building demo through fencing) est. 8–10 days.
  • Oncor Electric Delivery contacted for electrical disconnect & utility pole removal. Disconnect expected free of charge; pole removal fees TBD.
  • Gates — one existing 24-ft swing gate to be reused at marked location. Remove old fencing along yellow-marked perimeter. Install new 8-ft chain-link fencing along red-marked perimeter.
  • Fence & demo work will run concurrently — both starting Sun Apr 26. SENDME PRO handling both scopes.
